headline: Does GE’s (GE) New GE426 Air Force Contract Quietly Redefine Its Defense Engine Strategy?
summary: Earlier in May, GE Aerospace was awarded a U.S. Air Force contract to advance its GE426 engine through preliminary design review, progressing a medium‑thrust powerplant tailored for autonomous collaborative combat platforms and expanding its small-engine portfolio alongside programs like GEK800 and GEK1500. This move deepens GE Aerospace’s role in next-generation uncrewed military systems, underscoring how digital engineering and scalable, lower-cost engines are becoming central to future...

headline: Larry Kudlow: The ‘Trumpian Economy’ Is Booming Despite the Gas Price Noise
summary: Larry Kudlow spent Wednesday evening on Fox Business arguing that the economy is stronger than headlines admit. “The Trumpian economy is absolutely booming as is the stock market,” he said, listing the receipts: an Atlanta Fed nowcast pointing to 4.3% real GDP growth in the second quarter, core goods prices up only 1.1% excluding food ... Larry Kudlow: The ‘Trumpian Economy’ Is Booming Despite the Gas Price Noise

headline: Jim Cramer: Buy GE Aerospace, 'Two Thumbs Up' For This Life Sciences Stock
summary: On Mad Money Lightning Round, Cramer likes Joby Aviation for its spec and US gov. investment in drones. Recommends buying QXO, GE, and BTC.
